en.title: Dataset Cadaster
en.subtitle: A curated catalog of geospatial and environmental data sources
en.browse_by_domain_sub: Explore data sources organized across 14 thematic categories
en.tools_sub: Two ways to find the data you need
en.dataset_catalog_desc: Search, filter, and compare 500+ data sources. Filter by domain, cost, API support, and geographic scope.
en.geoestimator_desc: Plan your data needs. Get cost estimates, find the right free sources, and build your data budget for grant proposals.
en.about_text: Built to help researchers, students, and professionals find the right geospatial data for their work. All information is curated and verified against primary sources.
en.cite_text: This tool is free to use. If you find it useful, please cite:

hu.title: Adathalmaz Kataszter
hu.subtitle: Geoinformatikai es kornyezeti adatforrasok katalogusa
hu.browse_by_domain_sub: Fedezze fel az adatforrasokat 14 tematikus kategoriaban
hu.dataset_catalog_desc: Keressen, szurjon es hasonlitson ossze 500+ adatforast. Szurjon tema, koltseg, API tamogatas es foldrajzi terulet szerint.
hu.geoestimator_desc: Tervezze meg adatigenyeit. Kapjon koltsegbecslest, talalja meg a megfelelo ingyenes forrasokat.
hu.about_text: Kutatoknak, hallgatoknak es szakembereknek keszult, hogy megtalaljak a megfelelo terinformatikai adatokat. Minden informacio ellenorzott.
hu.cite_text: Az eszkoz ingyenesen hasznalhato. Ha hasznosnak talalja, kerem hivatkozzon ra:
